approve_date.text: วันที่อนุมัติ

root.sql: select sum(tab.row_memno)over(order by tab.change_doc_no) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT sc_mem_m_gain_change_head.change_doc_no, decode(lag(sc_mem_m_gain_change_head.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_m_gain_change_head.change_doc_no) ,sc_mem_m_gain_change_head.membership_no,0,1) as row_memno, sc_mem_m_gain_change_head.membership_no, sc_mem_m_gain_change_head.member_name, sc_mem_m_gain_change_head.change_date, sc_mem_m_gain_change_head.approve_status, sc_mem_m_gain_change_head.entry_id, pka_com_function.fp_get_user_name(sc_mem_m_gain_change_head.entry_id) as entry_name, sc_mem_m_gain_change_head.entry_date, sc_mem_m_gain_change_head.remark, sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.seq_no, sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.operate_type, (case sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.operate_type when 'NC' then 'คงเดิม' when 'CG' then 'เปลี่ยน' when 'DL' then 'ยกเลิก' when 'NW' then 'เพิ่ม' end) as operate_type_name, sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.old_prename_code, (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.old_prename_code ) as old_prename, sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.old_gain_name, sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.old_gain_surname, sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.old_concern_code, (select related_na from sc_mem_m_ucf_concern where conceern_code = sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.old_concern_code ) as old_related_na, sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.new_prename_code, (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.new_prename_code ) as new_prename, sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.new_gain_name, sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.new_gain_surname, sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.new_concern_code, (select related_na from sc_mem_m_ucf_concern where conceern_code = sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.new_concern_code ) as new_related_na, sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.new_gain_id_card, pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.new_gain_id_card , 'X-XXXX-XXXXX-XX-XXXXXXXX' ) as from_new_gain_id_card, sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.new_gain_telephone FROM sc_mem_m_gain_change_head, sc_mem_m_gain_change_det, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE ( sc_mem_m_gain_change_head.change_doc_no = sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.change_doc_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_gain_change_head.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( ( sc_mem_m_gain_change_head.approve_status = '1' ) ) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_gain_change_head.change_doc_no ,sc_mem_m_gain_change_det.seq_no )tab
